category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Moroccan market (IMANOR NM standards, import conformity, energy labelling, ANRT).

title.en: China-to-Morocco LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入摩洛哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入摩洛哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Moroccan requirements: IMANOR NM standards (adopting IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471), mandatory import conformity / attestation administered by the Ministry of Industry, appliance energy labelling, and ANRT type approval for wireless products, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与摩洛哥要求差距对照：IMANOR NM 标准（采用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471）、工业部管理的强制进口符合性/认证、家电能效标签，以及无线产品的 ANRT 型号核准，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與摩洛哥要求差距對照：IMANOR NM 標準（採用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471）、工業部管理的強制進口符合性/認證、家電能效標籤，以及無線產品的 ANRT 型號核准，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Moroccan law, IMANOR NM standards, import-conformity (attestation/CMIM-type) requirements, energy-labelling rules, and ANRT type-approval obligations with qualified professionals and the in-country importer before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及在摩进口商核验现行摩洛哥法律、IMANOR NM 标准、进口符合性（认证/CMIM 类）要求、能效标签规则及 ANRT 型号核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及在摩進口商核驗現行摩洛哥法律、IMANOR NM 標準、進口符合性（認證/CMIM 類）要求、能效標籤規則及 ANRT 型號核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Morocco must: meet the safety requirements of the applicable IMANOR NM standard (which adopts IEC 60598-1 for general luminaires and IEC 62560 / 62471 for light sources and photobiological safety); clear mandatory import conformity / pre-shipment attestation administered by the Ministry of Industry for regulated electrical products (an in-country importer is required); comply with Morocco's appliance energy-efficiency labelling where the product is in scope (Morocco uses an energy label rather than an EU-style Ecodesign minimum-performance regime, so map EU 'Ecodesign' to the Moroccan energy label, not to a binding efficacy floor); obtain ANRT type approval if the luminaire has wireless functionality; and note that Morocco has no EU-style horizontal RoHS / REACH-SVHC regime — restricted-substance control runs through general chemical and product-safety law plus contractual buyer requirements, so RoHS must be mapped honestly as 'no direct local equivalent.' None of these are covered by existing CCC certification or China Energy Label registration.
answer_first.zh: 向摩洛哥出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：满足适用 IMANOR NM 标准的安全要求（通用灯具采用 IEC 60598-1，光源及光生物安全采用 IEC 62560 / 62471）；通过工业部对受管制电气产品实施的强制进口符合性/装运前认证（须有在摩进口商）；在产品适用时符合摩洛哥家电能效标签（摩洛哥采用能效标签而非欧盟式生态设计最低性能制度，故将欧盟「生态设计」对应到摩洛哥能效标签，而非约束性能效下限）；若灯具具备无线功能则取得 ANRT 型号核准；并注意摩洛哥没有欧盟式横向 RoHS / REACH-SVHC 制度——限用物质控制通过一般化学品及产品安全法规加上买方合同要求实现，故 RoHS 须如实对应为「无直接本地等效」。上述均不被现有 CCC 认证或中国能效标识注册所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 向摩洛哥出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：滿足適用 IMANOR NM 標準的安全要求（通用燈具採用 IEC 60598-1，光源及光生物安全採用 IEC 62560 / 62471）；通過工業部對受管制電氣產品實施的強制進口符合性/裝運前認證（須有在摩進口商）；在產品適用時符合摩洛哥家電能效標籤（摩洛哥採用能效標籤而非歐盟式生態設計最低性能制度，故將歐盟「生態設計」對應到摩洛哥能效標籤，而非約束性能效下限）；若燈具具備無線功能則取得 ANRT 型號核准；並注意摩洛哥沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS / REACH-SVHC 制度——限用物質控制通過一般化學品及產品安全法規加上買方合同要求實現，故 RoHS 須如實對應為「無直接本地等效」。上述均不被現有 CCC 認證或中國能效標識注冊所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Each cycle re-verify the applicable IMANOR NM standard references, the Ministry of Industry import-conformity/attestation scope, the Moroccan appliance energy-labelling scope, and ANRT type-approval thresholds against current official sources.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. The status of Morocco's restricted-substance (RoHS-equivalent) framework must be re-checked each cycle, as Morocco may evolve its chemical and product-safety law.
